human_approval.change_reason: RETROACTIVE APPROVAL: Wave 5 migrations (0137-0144) were created and applied without prior Stage A approval artifacts due to agent workflow error. This retroactive approval documents the compliance gap and brings the implementation into compliance with REGULATED_SURFACE_PATHS.yml requirements. The migrations are already applied to the database and verified working.

notes: This is a retroactive approval created as part of REM-2026-04-23_WAVE5_COMPLIANCE_REMEDIATION. The migrations were implemented before compliance documentation was created, which violates the Symphony process. Future implementations must follow AGENT_ENTRYPOINT.md and create approval artifacts before editing regulated surfaces.
